title: reduce
description: Collapse an array into one value.

questions.explanation: acc starts at 0. Each step adds n → 1, 3, 6, 10.

questions.prompt: The SECOND argument to reduce is:
options: The initial value of the accumulator
questions.explanation: Always provide the initial value — otherwise reduce uses the first element as the seed, which is often wrong.
String concatenation with reduce — same idea as .join('').
